_source: MA DESE E2C Hub (Enrollment by Race/Ethnicity, Gender, and Selected Populations dataset t8td-gens) + DESE per-pupil expenditure report + NCES CCD directory (via Urban Institute Education Data API for NCES leaid <-> DESE org-code crosswalk)
_notes: All demographic fields (enrollment, race/ethnicity %, ECD %, EL %, SWD %) are from DESE E2C dataset t8td-gens for school year 2025-26. Per-pupil spending is DESE's reported total expenditures per pupil for FY2024. Race fields are percentages summing to ~100; 'other' is the residual after the 7 reported categories. Keys are NCES district IDs (7-digit) matching phone-policies.json. Districts unmatched by NCES ID are matched by normalized district name. Some 2525xxx 'tuition arrangement' pseudo-IDs in phone-policies do not correspond to NCES districts and have all-null demographic fields.
